distributors.name: Berlin Arcade Supply GmbH
distributors.notes: Primary authorized distributor for Berlin with focus on prize cranes and redemption games.

distributors.name: Tokyo Entertainment Systems Co., Ltd.
distributors.notes: Focus on high-end racing simulators and VR attractions.

distributors.name: Berlin Coin-Op Partners
distributors.notes: Non-exclusive reseller; not an authorized distributor for warranty claims.

events.title: Euro Amusement Expo 2026
events.description: Join us in Berlin for Euro Amusement Expo 2026. Visit our booth for hands-on access to the latest prize cranes, ticket redemption games, and compact 110V arcades. A dedicated on-site demo zone will feature 15-minute one-on-one product demos throughout the show.

events.title: IAAPA North America Expo 2026
events.description: See our full amusement portfolio at IAAPA North America 2026 in Orlando, including new racing simulators and basketball arcade machines. Reserve a 15-minute on-site demo with our product specialists.

events.title: Asia Attractions Forum 2026
events.description: A conference-focused event in Singapore covering regional trends in family entertainment centers, cashless payments, and operations.

events.title: Webinar: Cashless Payments for Arcades (Q2 2026)
events.description: Live 60-minute webinar on implementing cashless payments across mixed amusement machine fleets.

events.title: Factory Open House & Training 2025
events.description: Hands-on factory tour with live demonstrations of new air hockey tables and crane machines. Includes on-site technical training demos.

events.title: Euro Leisure Summit 2025
events.description: Panel discussions and networking for operators and distributors across Europe.

events.title: Regional Distributor Meeting EMEA 2026
events.description: Closed-door strategy and training sessions for authorized EMEA distributors.

events.title: Virtual Launch: Galaxy Claw Pro
events.description: Online product launch highlighting the new Galaxy Claw Pro crane machine, installation options, and maintenance tips.

financing_plan_definitions.name: 36-Month Standard Plan (USD)
financing_plan_definitions.description: Popular mid-term plan suitable for most arcade projects, fixed monthly payments over 36 months.

financing_plan_definitions.name: 48-Month Extended Plan (USD)
financing_plan_definitions.description: Lower monthly payment option with extended 48-month term, ideal for higher-value machines.

financing_plan_definitions.name: 24-Month Fast Track Plan (USD)
financing_plan_definitions.description: Shorter-term plan with slightly lower interest for faster payoff.

product_categories.name: All Products
product_categories.description: Browse the full catalog of amusement machines, from basketball games and racers to cranes and ticket redemption.

product_categories.name: Basketball & Sports Games
product_categories.description: Basketball hoop shooters, pitch-and-throw games, and other competitive sports arcades.

product_categories.name: Racing & Driving
product_categories.description: Sit-down and motion racing simulators, compact drivers, and linked cabinet systems.

product_categories.name: Ticket Redemption Games
product_categories.description: Skill-based and chance ticket redemption games for family entertainment centers and bowling alleys.

product_categories.name: Prize Cranes & Merchandisers
product_categories.description: Claw cranes, capsule and plush merchandisers, and specialty prize payout machines.

product_categories.name: Air Hockey & Table Games
product_categories.description: Air hockey tables, foosball, and other competitive table games for arcade and bowling venues.

product_categories.name: Other Machines
product_categories.description: Photo booths, kiddie rides, change machines, and other supporting equipment.

products.name: Hoop Hero Duo
products.short_description: Compact 2-player basketball game with LED scoring and ticket output.
products.description: Hoop Hero Duo is a space-saving two-player basketball arcade machine designed for high throughput in FECs and bowling centers. It features adjustable difficulty, bright LED lighting, and optional ticket payout integration.

products.name: Street Shot Double
products.short_description: Full-size street-style 2-player basketball machine with moving hoop.
products.description: Street Shot Double brings an authentic street basketball feel with dynamic hoop movement, sound effects, and competitive 2-player play. Ideal for high-traffic arcades needing strong visual presence.

products.name: Compact Court 2P
products.short_description: Narrow-body 2-player basketball game optimized for compact locations.
products.description: Compact Court 2P delivers full-featured 2-player gameplay in a reduced footprint, making it perfect for smaller venues and compact 110V arcades. Features operator-adjustable pricing and difficulty.

products.name: Mega Hoops Arena
products.short_description: Four-player linked basketball attraction for anchor locations.
products.description: Mega Hoops Arena links four lanes into a stadium-style experience with synchronized light shows and tournament modes. Recommended for flagship locations with generous floor space.

products.name: Turbo Drift Compact
products.short_description: Single-seat compact racing simulator designed for 110V locations.
products.description: Turbo Drift Compact delivers high-end driving action in a reduced footprint. With force-feedback steering, 32" HD display, and linkable networking, it is ideal for compact 110V arcades and mixed game rooms.

products.name: Rally Motion DX
products.description: Rally Motion DX uses a 3DOF motion platform, surround sound, and 55" curved display to deliver immersive rally racing. Best suited for flagship locations with 220V three-phase power.

products.name: Ticket Tower Spin
products.short_description: Vertical wheel ticket redemption game with adjustable odds.
products.description: Ticket Tower Spin is a visually striking upright ticket redemption game featuring a spinning LED wheel. It operates on standard 110V power and fits comfortably into compact 130 cm-wide layouts.

products.name: Pirate Payout Adventure
products.short_description: Two-player skill shot ticket redemption game with pirate theme.
products.description: Pirate Payout Adventure offers head-to-head cannonball launching action with large animated targets and bonus jackpots, ideal as a centerpiece attraction in larger FECs.

products.name: Galaxy Claw Pro
products.short_description: Premium 1-player crane with RGB lighting and telemetry-ready controls.
products.description: Galaxy Claw Pro is a feature-rich prize crane designed for high uptime and easy service. It supports plush, capsules, or boxed prizes, and includes operator-adjustable claw strength, remote telemetry, and simple 110V installation.

products.name: Mini Claw Cube
products.short_description: Compact claw machine designed for counters and tight spaces.
products.description: Mini Claw Cube is a small-footprint prize crane that fits into narrow aisles and counter ends. Running on 110V power with a width under 1 meter, it is perfect for compact arcade projects and secondary placement.

products.name: Mega Prize Palace XL
products.short_description: Large-format merchandiser for high-value prizes and bundle packs.
products.description: Mega Prize Palace XL is a large prize merchandiser suited for airports and flagship FECs. It supports oversized prize boxes and multi-compartment layouts, with configurable 110V/220V input.

products.name: Air Storm Hockey
products.short_description: Full-size 2-player air hockey table with LED rails and overhead scoring.
products.description: Air Storm Hockey is built for bowling centers and FECs, featuring high-output blower motors, impact-resistant rails, and overhead score display with sound effects. Standard 110V power and a 127 cm width make it a great fit for compact layouts.

products.name: ThunderStrike Air Hockey 8ft
products.short_description: 8-foot air hockey table with underglow lighting and sound package.
products.description: ThunderStrike Air Hockey 8ft offers a tournament-size playfield with full RGB underglow lighting package and powerful blowers. Ideal for larger bowling centers with more floor space.

products.name: PhotoSnap Booth Classic
products.short_description: Classic enclosed photo booth with dye-sub printing and social sharing.
products.description: PhotoSnap Booth Classic combines nostalgia with modern features like instant dye-sublimation prints, green-screen backgrounds, and social media sharing. Runs from standard 110V outlets.

products.name: Kiddie Rover Ride
products.short_description: Coin-operated kiddie ride with space rover theme.
products.description: Kiddie Rover Ride is a durable, low-maintenance kiddie ride with gentle motion and bright theming. Suitable for malls, cinemas, and FEC entry areas with standard 110V power.

products.name: Classic Hoops Single
products.short_description: Classic single-lane basketball game, now superseded by Hoop Hero Duo.
products.description: Classic Hoops Single offers straightforward one-player basketball action with mechanical scoring. This model has been discontinued and replaced by Hoop Hero Duo.

products.name: Speedway Twin Racer
products.short_description: Linked twin racing cabinet with 50" displays.
products.description: Speedway Twin Racer links two sit-down racers in a shared cabinet for head-to-head competition. Scheduled for release in late 2026.
